action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline LGB (50 rounds) achieved ic_mean=0.0281, rank_ic_mean=0.0081 on test (484 days). Training+eval pipeline works (data loading ~43s, total iter ~120s). Analysis: Low boosting rounds likely underfit tabular Alpha158 features; valid period early-stopping not fully leveraged; stock IC benefits from more capacity. Decision: Increment to 1000 rounds, lower lr=0.03, increase num_leaves=64 + fractions for better generalization while keeping training fast; rerun train then submit_eval to measure improvement and update time budget estimate.
